name: Moroccan Potato Casserole
intro: This is a very colorful dish and a very tasty one. A dressing made from fresh herbs and spices gives this vegetable dish a Moroccan flavor. It is a great vegan recipe!

ingredients.item: ½ pound of red potatoes, sliced 1/2 inch thick
large red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
yellow bell pepper, cut into 1 1/2 inch squares
large green bell pepper, cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces

method: Combine garlic, 1/2 teaspoon salt, paprika, cumin, and cayenne in a food processor bowl. Process until mixture forms a paste. Add herbs, and pulse a few times to blend. Add lemon juice, vinegar, and 2 to 3 tablespoons olive oil; blend. Season to taste with salt.

In a large bowl, combine potatoes, peppers, and celery. Season with salt, and toss with herb sauce. Transfer to a large shallow baking dish. Scatter tomatoes among the potato mixture. Drizzle 1 to 2 tablespoons oil over the top, and cover with foil.
Bake for 35 minutes. Remove foil. Continue baking until vegetables are tender, 20 to 30 minutes. Serve warm.
